content.en:
"Fire Pattern War Ancestor, I still have a batch of treasures in my hand, can I deal with them for the Battle Gate?"

Ye Tian contacted the Fire Emblem War Ancestor.

"What treasure?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor asked.

"It's some holy relics and special treasures!"

Ye Tian said.

"Relic?"

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor was a little surprised.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took out the holy relics obtained from those saints one by one, as well as some unrecognizable treasures.

The reason why he wanted to dispose of these treasures to the Battle Gate was because he was afraid that the Supreme Domain Ancestors would leave some marks on these treasures, and if they were traced through these treasures, he would be in trouble.

Of course, this is not very likely.

But he still didn't dare to keep these treasures, nor did he dare to give them to his relatives, so he naturally handed them over to the war gate to deal with.

In the future, if he is strong, he will be able to obtain holy relics with his own strength.

Therefore, it is the best choice to dispose of these holy relics and secret treasures.

"You killed the Saint Giver of the Dark Destruction Domain?"

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor guessed and asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Very good!" Fire Emblem Zhan Zu smiled happily.

Killing the Holy Giver of the Dark Destruction Domain is tantamount to killing the future powerhouse of the Dark Destruction Domain.

"These holy relics are very valuable, and these secret treasures are also worth a lot of money, what do you want to exchange?"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor asked.

"I want to change some of my skills, can I?"

Ye Tian asked.

Holy skills, he will not dislike less.

Naturally, the more the merrier!

"Good!"

The Fire Emblem War Ancestor agreed.

Next, Ye Tian exchanged for six holy skills from the battle gate.

this day.

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor handed over a broken Strength Ancestor Law Inheritance to Ye Tian, and required Ye Tian to cultivate in the Battle Realm and not leave here.

After all, this transaction involved two incomplete ancestral methods, and the value was too high, if Ye Tianzhen ran away, the loss of the battle gate would be too great.

Therefore, the battle gate must also be cautious.

Ye Tian did not leave the Battle Realm Realm, but what the Fire Emblem War Ancestor and the others didn't know was that Ye Tian in the Battle Realm Tower was a copy of Ye Tian's condensed body again, and his body was still in the Human Realm of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to comprehend from the Golden Body Holy Technique.

With the help of the Ancestor Method of the Incomplete Emperor, Ye Tian's comprehension speed in the Golden Body Sacred Technique was very fast.

Entry!

Xiaocheng!

Dacheng!

......

Millions of years passed, and Ye Tian had finally cultivated the Golden Body Saint Technique to the consummation realm.

Subsequently, he began to cultivate the Extreme Divine Technique.

Originally, the Extreme Saint Technique was in the Dacheng realm, so when he was only a million years old, with the help of the Ancestor Law of the Infinite Force, he cultivated the Extreme Saint Technique to the perfection realm in one fell swoop.

After that, Ye Tian began to cultivate another Divine Technique of Strength, the Hegemony Sacred Technique.

After the completion of the Hegemony Holy Technique, Ye Tian handed over all the two Broken Ancestor Methods to the Battle Gate.

In the following days, Ye Tian cultivated the Space Saint Technique, the Void Escape Saint Technique, and it took millions of years to cultivate it to the consummation realm.

By this time, Ye Tian had already mastered the Seven Perfection Saint Techniques.

These seven consummation holy techniques are the Golden Silk Holy Technique, the Void Slash Holy Technique, the Holy Armor Holy Technique, the Golden Body Holy Technique, the Extreme Holy Technique, the Hegemony Holy Technique, and the Void Escape Holy Technique.

The Seven Perfection Sacred Techniques, what a terrible achievement!

Even if the Supreme Domain Ancestors knew that Ye Tian had cultivated the Seven Consummation Saint Techniques, they would be jealous!

-----------------

"The Seven Holy Techniques have been completed, the body, soul, and forbidden power have all been transformed seven times, which is much stronger than before, and if you break through to the Domain Ancestor level, the improvement will be extremely huge. When I step into the Domain Ancestor level, even if I have just broken through, my strength will be enough to easily crush the ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He wasn't going to continue looking for opportunities to complete his cultivation of other holy techniques, there was no need for that.

When the seventh holy technique was consummated, he felt that the transformation was not large, and the effect was not very good.

No matter how much he cultivated the Perfection Holy Technique, he could only improve the effect a little bit, and then he didn't know what chance he had to master another Perfection Holy Technique, so there was no need to waste time.

"Then prepare to break through!"

Ye Tian decided.

this day.

The human world.

Ye Tian began to retreat and comprehend the mysteries of the Domain Ancestor, in fact, at his level, he had already comprehended the mysteries of the Domain Ancestors, plus he had already comprehended the three Ancestral Methods, even if two of them were relatively incomplete, it also gave him a weak understanding of the Ancestral Path, and this weak understanding overrode the Ancestral Mysteries.

Therefore, Ye Tian comprehended it a little, and he completely understood the key to the mystery of Yu Zu.

Yu Zu understood the mystery, the forbidden Dao and the physical body Dao were ten percent fused, and the forbidden body was also ten percent perfect, Ye Tian completely met the requirements for promoting the domain ancestor.

And so.

Ye Tian began to impact the Domain Ancestor level.

Impacting the realm of domain ancestors is to transform the body into a domain body, and the forbidden power on the body is transformed into a forbidden domain force, and the soul is completely transformed to a higher level.

"Break my !!!"

The shackles that hindered Yu Zu were easily broken through by Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's breath was soaring rapidly, and his body, soul, and forbidden power were all rapidly transforming.

In a short time, Ye Tian completely broke the shackles.

However, it takes a long time to break through and stabilize the realm.

During this period of time, he was in the process of transformation.

Year after year, Ye Tian's strength is getting stronger and stronger, but the transformation is still not over.

Until the day of the 300,000th year, Ye Tiancai finally completed the transformation.

At this time, he can be regarded as the real domain ancestor!

"Very strong!"

Ye Tian felt his own strength.

He is now at least dozens of times stronger than in the past, and he can easily suppress his previous self.

Even if he was holding the Forbidden Yuan Blade when he returned to the One Realm, he was afraid that he would not be able to beat his current self.

Moreover, as soon as he broke through the Domain Ancestor level, Ye Tian found that the Holy Technique had become more powerful, and it didn't take much strength to use the Holy Technique all the time.

At the level of the One Realm, he didn't dare to use the Holy Technique all the time, but now he didn't have to worry.

It is conceivable that at the level of the Domain Ancestor, he constantly performs a holy skill, and how terrifying the strength he exerts!

Ye Tian did not leave the customs immediately, but continued to cultivate.

He was ready to elevate his cultivation to the next level, and the cultivation at the Domain Ancestor level was the Domain Body.

The domain body is divided into the beginning of the domain body, the small completion of the domain body, the completion of the domain body, and the realm of perfection, which is the division of cultivation.

Once the domain body has reached the state of consummation, it can undergo its first transformation.

The transformation of the domain body will become a higher-level domain body, and this kind of domain body is called the elite domain body, and at this time, it will step into the realm of the elite domain ancestor.

The elite domain body began to cultivate from the beginning, cultivated to the consummation realm again, and after the second transformation, it became a top domain body.

It's not difficult to have a top-level domain, but it's the strongest domain that is difficult.

The reason why it was difficult for the Domain Ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm to be promoted to the Supreme Domain Ancestors was that there was no way for the top Domain Body to transform into a Supreme Domain Body.

Although Ye Tian had just broken through, if he wanted to cultivate an ordinary domain body to the consummation realm, he was afraid that it would take a long time, but now that he had an ancestral medicine, one ancestral medicine was enough to raise his cultivation to the consummation realm of the ordinary domain body.
